end local function T(T)return t[T-(594273+-576247)]end do local return(function(t,A,K,P,l,F,Q,V,e,S,U,a,R,G,j,c,h,O,X,f,d,i)S,d,V,G,a,f,h,R,O,i,e,U,j,X,c=function(t,T)local A=V(T)local K=function(K)return O(t,{K},T,A)end return K end,function(t,T)local A=V(T)local end end end O=#l return A(Q)end,function(t,T)local A=V(T)local K=function(K,P,l)return O(t,{K,P;l},T,A)end return K end,function(t,T)local A=V(T)local K=function()return O(t,{},T,A)end return K end,function(t,T)local A=V(T)local K=function(K,P)return O(t,{K;P},T,A)end return K end,{},{},function(t,T)local A=V(T)local K=function(K,P,l,F,Q)return O(t,{K,P,l;F;Q},T,A)end return K end return(d(1597527-(-206386),{}))(A(Q))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[T(-875513-(-893567))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
